title: FinOps in Practice: How We Reduced Cloud Costs by 42% for a Global Retailer
excerpt: How UP2CLOUD's FinOps audit methodology — tagging strategy, rightsizing, reserved instances, and spot fleets — delivered $4,200/month in cloud savings for a global retailer.

title: Terraform at Scale: IaC Best Practices for Multi-Cloud Teams
excerpt: Module structure, remote state management, workspace strategy, policy as code with Sentinel/OPA, and CI/CD integration for teams managing hundreds of resources.

title: AI-Powered Incident Response: From Alert to Resolution in Under 60 Seconds
excerpt: How AI agents detect, correlate, and resolve production incidents in under 60 seconds — reducing MTTR by 10× and eliminating 3am wake-up calls for on-call engineers.

title: Kubernetes Security Hardening: A Production Checklist for 2025
excerpt: A practical Kubernetes security checklist for 2025: RBAC, Pod Security Standards, network policies, secrets management, supply-chain controls, and runtime threat detection.

title: Platform Engineering vs DevOps: What's the Difference and Why It Matters in 2025
excerpt: Platform Engineering is redefining how teams build and ship software. Learn how Internal Developer Platforms, golden paths, and self-service tooling differ from traditional DevOps practices.

title: The Business Case for DevSecOps: Ship Faster Without Sacrificing Security
excerpt: Late-stage vulnerabilities cost 30× more to fix than shift-left catches. Here's the ROI case for integrating SAST, DAST, IaC scanning, and compliance as code into your CI/CD pipeline.
